title: [codereview-1] T-Deck gateway WiFi: verify NET_L2_ETHERNET compatibility with ESP32 WiFi driver
description: The Heltec V3 gateway uses CONFIG_NET_L2_ETHERNET=y with WiFi. Confirm if T-Deck ESP32-S3 requires the same or if NET_L2_WIFI or specific ESP WiFi L2 is needed. Check Zephyr ESP32 WiFi integration for border router prefix delegation and RPL root. File if mismatch in L2 driver binding.
